title: carex × naegelii
intro: Carex × naegelii, also known as the hybrid sedge or naegeli's sedge, is a hybrid plant species within the Carex genus, often found in wetland areas and known for its distinctive foliage. This plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in East Asia, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Carex × naegelii are said to include relief from arthritis, kidney stones, and other conditions related to fluid retention and inflammation, as well as potential antioxidant and antibacterial properties. Carex × naegelii can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or infusion, or used in herbal supplements and topical creams to harness its medicinal benefits.
